message:
fix(wasm): add stub implementations for compression and process modules

- Add WASM stub types and functions for libdeflate (gzip/deflate/zlib)
- Add WASM stub types and functions for brotli compression
- Use conditional compilation to select native vs WASM implementations
- Add stub pid/ppid values (1/0) for WASM builds since getpid/getppid unavailable
